title: Jaunty Cavalier

{{Quote|She goes by the name of ''Jaunty Cavalier'' and is owned by a Wookiee called Rufarr. In fact, I'm surprised to see him return here. He left owing me some credits.|Bakura Orbital Control to Jagged Fel during ''Jaunty Cavalier''{{'s}} unauthorized approach to Bakura|<ref name="FH2" />}}
The '''''Jaunty Cavalier''''' was a [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Rufarr]], who operated it alongside a crew of six beings. The [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] was a common sight around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conflict]] fought by the denizens of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] against the extragalactic [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], the crew of the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' was contracted by [[Molierre Cundertol]], [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]] of Bakura, to take delivery of a [[Human replica droid]] made in his image and take it to [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]], the [[Ssi-ruu]]k [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. The crew then staged Cundertol's kidnapping to transport the Prime Minister to the same location.

Cundertol was in league with the Ssi-ruuk, a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that inhabited a [[Ssi-ruuk Star Cluster|star cluster]] near to Bakura. After a [[Invasion of Bakura|failed invasion attempt]] on Bakura [[4 ABY/Legends|twenty-four years earlier]], the Ssi-ruuk were looking to [[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|try again]]. In exchange for using the Ssi-ruuvi [[entechment]] process to transfer his life essence into the [[Human/Legends|Human]] replica [[Droid/Legends|droid]], Cundertol was to assist them in taking the planet. With the process completed, the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' took Cundertol back to Bakura. However, to ensure secrecy about his new immortal condition, Cundertol murdered the crew of the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' and sabotaged the ship. The vessel was destroyed shortly after exiting [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] above Bakura, but the Prime Minister ejected in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]. After being rescued, he spun a tale of being kidnapped by the crew of the ''Jaunty Cavalier'', escaping and overpowering them before turning the ship around to make it home.

==Description==
The ''Jaunty Cavalier'' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] with an asymmetrical design. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]], which regularly operated with a crew of seven and carried at least one [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]], was in a state of disrepair<ref name="FH2" /> by [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].<ref name="ERC" />

==History==
===Operating around Bakura===
The ''Jaunty Cavalier'' was a YT-series vessel owned by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Rufarr]], who [[Captain/Legends|captained]] the ship alongside a crew of six other beings.<ref name="FH2" /> By 28 ABY,<ref name="ERC" /> the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' operated in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] close to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] and was a regular visitor to the planet. During one such visit, Rufarr ended up owing an [[Bakura Orbital Control operator|operator]] working with [[Bakura Orbital Control]] a sum of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="FH2" />

===Contracted by Cundertol===
{{Quote|So let me get this straight. Cundertol covertly pays someone untold millions of credits to build a replica droid of himself. Right? Then he books the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' to pick up the droid from the manufacturer and deliver it somewhere near here. We don't know where yet; maybe an abandoned base or a temporary station. It doesn't really matter, just as long as it's somewhere private.|Jagged Fel|<ref name="FH2" />}}
[[File:SsiruuNEGAS.jpg|thumb|left|A Ssi-ruu, one of the architects of the ''Jaunty Cavalier''{{'s}} eventual fate]]
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war]] against the [[The galaxy/Legends|extragalactic]] invaders known as the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], Rufarr and the crew of the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' were contracted by [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]] [[Molierre Cundertol]] of Bakura to take delivery of a [[Human replica droid]] that had been made in Cundertol's image and deliver it<ref name="FH2" /> to [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|142|Jaunty Cavalier}}</ref> the [[Ssi-ruu]]k [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. As part of the deal, the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' crew were to also transport Cundertol to the location, but it had to be done in secrecy.<ref name="FH2" />

Cundertol had secretly negotiated an agreement with the [[Ssi-ruu]]k, a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from a nearby [[Ssi-ruuk Star Cluster|star cluster]] that had [[Invasion of Bakura|previously attempted]] to invade Bakura [[4 ABY/Legends|twenty-four years earlier]]. In exchange for using their [[entechment]] technology to transfer his life essence to the [[Human/Legends|Human]] replica [[Droid/Legends|droid]]—in effect, gaining immortality—Cundertol promised to assist in their second attempt to invade Bakura.<ref name="FH2" />

Rufarr and the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' crew staged the kidnapping of the Prime Minister and spirited him off to the secret location where the transfer was successfully completed.<ref name="FH2" /> In doing so, they were implicated as radical members of the [[Freedom resistance movement]],<ref name="CSWE" /> an anti-[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] organization that supported a more independent Bakura free of outside influence. The ''Jaunty Cavalier'' was then used to take Cundertol back to Bakura. However, the Prime Minister could not risk the crew of the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' contradicting any story he came up with to cover his disappearance, so he murdered the crew and sabotaged the ship.<ref name="FH2" />

===Return to Bakura===
{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Jaunty Cavalier''. You have ten seconds to comply with my instructions or you will be intercepted. Please respond.|Jagged Fel|<ref name="FH2" />}}
As the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] over Bakura, it went into an uncontrolled spin and its drive units fired at random intervals. The vessel's [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] insertion took it close to the [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] [[Pride of Selonia (Lancer-class)|''Pride of Selonia'']], a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] ship that had arrived at Bakura on a mission to re-establish contact with worlds that had been cut off from the galaxy due to the Yuuzhan Vong advance across the galaxy. Since the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' was out of control and dangerously close to the ''Pride of Selonia'', the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the Alliance [[Frigate/Legends|frigate's]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], [[Jagged Fel]], attempted to hail the vessel, instructing them to change course or action would be taken.<ref name="FH2" />

When no response was forthcoming, and with the possibility that the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' might hit the ''Pride of Selonia'', Fel requested and received permission from Bakura Orbital Control to attempt to nudge the wayward freighter out of the ''Pride''{{'s}} way. Fel—along with four other fighters from [[Twin Suns Squadron]]—moved in close, using their [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] to gradually move the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' clear of both the ''Pride of Selonia'' and Bakura's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. During the maneuver, the ''Jaunty Cavalier''{{'s}} [[Engine/Legends|engines]] abruptly flashed and died.<ref name="FH2" />

Fel, recognizing the beginnings of an explosive drive failure, ordered his fellow [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] to break away from the freighter immediately. The drive unit exploded, destroying much of the vessel. Only part of the forward structural chassis remained recognizable. Despite the force of the ''Jaunty Cavalier''{{'s}} explosion, Fel and his fellow pilots managed to escape the blast wave.<ref name="FH2" />

===Cundertol's deception===
{{Quote|Dont write it off just yet, Twin One. We registered a launched from ''Jaunty Cavalier'' just before the detonation. It looked like a small pod of some kind.|Captain Todra Mayn|<ref name="FH2" />}}
[[File:Bakura.jpg|thumb|right|Bakura, the location of the ''Jaunty Cavalier''{{'s}} destruction]]
Just prior to the explosion, an escape pod launched from the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' containing Cundertol. Rescued by Fel, the Prime Minister was taken aboard the ''Pride of Selonia'', where he relayed a story to Captain [[Todra Mayn]], the frigate's commander, about being kidnapped by the crew of the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' inside the [[Bakur Memorial Building|Bakuran Senate Complex]] and being smuggled out of the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] disguised as a box of records. He told those assembled in the medical bay—which included Fel—that he believed he had been kidnapped with the express intention of being interrogated and then [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Because of this, Cundertol chose to attempt to escape and managed to get free from his restraints. He told them a tale of how he overpowered the crew, then turned the ship around and headed back to Bakura, where the ''Jaunty Cavalier'' developed "system rot" and began falling apart around him, barely escaping the vessel in time.<ref name="FH2" />

Eventually, Cundertol's involvement in the [[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|subsequent Ssi-ruuvi invasion]] of Bakura was discovered, and the truth behind the ''Jaunty Cavalier''{{'s}} mission and later destruction was revealed.<ref name="FH2" />

==Commanders and crew==
{{Quote|You have to feel sorry for the crew of the ''Jaunty Cavalier''. Cundertol sacrificed them all so that no one would contradict his story.|[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|<ref name="FH2" />}}
The ''Jaunty Cavalier'' was owned and commanded by Rufarr, a Wookiee. The vessel was crewed by six other beings in addition to Rufarr—four Humans and two [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]].<ref name="FH2" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Jaunty Cavalier'' first appeared in the [[2003]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'', the second book in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']]{{'s}} [[Force Heretic trilogy|''Force Heretic'' trilogy]], written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]]. The ''Jaunty Cavalier''{{'s}} entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' indicated that the vessel exploded shortly after exiting hyperspace near Bakura due to Cundertol's sabotage; while Cundertol's sabotage did result in the destruction of the ship, it did not happen immediately after reverting to [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]].
